title: 'Round Midnight
overview: Inside the Blue Note nightclub one night in 1959 Paris, an aged, ailing jazzman coaxes an eloquent wail from his tenor sax. Outside, a young Parisian too broke to buy a glass of wine strains to hear those notes. Soon they will form a friendship that sparks a final burst of genius.

trailers.title: Autour de minuit - Bande-annonce officielle (VF) - François Cluzet
